entities.name: CROP PLANTS
entities.description: Plants used for agricultural production

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural product produced per unit area

entities.name: STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand adverse environmental conditions

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist attack by pathogens

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a population over time

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The capacity of a crop to recover from or adapt to climate-related stresses

entities.name: TRADITIONAL BREEDING METHODS
entities.description: Conventional approaches to crop improvement based on phenotypic selection

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach that uses genome-wide markers to predict breeding values

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A process where a marker is used for indirect selection of a trait

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION STUDIES
entities.description: A method to associate genetic variants with specific traits across the genome

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT GENOTYPING
entities.description: Rapid and large-scale determination of genetic variants

entities.name: PHENOMICS
entities.description: The large-scale study of phenotypes

entities.name: MULTI-OMICS
entities.description: The integration of multiple omics data types

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: Computational algorithms used to analyze complex data and make predictions

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers distributed across the entire genome

entities.name: MAJOR-EFFECT LOCI
entities.description: Genetic locations that have a significant impact on a trait

entities.name: SMALL-EFFECT LOCI
entities.description: Genetic locations that have a minor impact on a trait

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by living organisms such as pests and pathogens

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress caused by non-living factors such as drought or salinity

entities.name: CLIMATIC UNCERTAINTY
entities.description: Unpredictability of weather patterns and climate change

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL OUTPUT
entities.description: The total production of agricultural goods

entities.name: BREEDING VALUES
entities.description: The genetic merit of an individual as estimated by its breeding value

entities.name: SELECTION ACCURACY
entities.description: The correlation between the predicted and actual breeding values

entities.name: BREEDING CYCLES
entities.description: The time taken to develop a new cultivar from selection to release

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The long-term enhancement of crops while maintaining ecological balance

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food
